title: Steer by wire type steering apparatus
abstract: A steer by wire type steering apparatus comprises a first guide member formed in an axial shape, a second guide member coupled to or integrally formed with the first guide member and having a helical guide groove that gradually decreases in diameter from the outer periphery to the center, a housing in which the first guide member and the second guide member are built in, and a radial slot is formed in a portion facing the guide groove, and a moving member having one end supported by the slot and the other end supported by the guide groove and radially moving along the slot.
claims: 1. A steer by wire type steering apparatus comprising: a first guide member formed in an axial shape; a second guide member coupled to or integrally formed with the first guide member and having a helical guide groove that gradually decreases in diameter from the outer periphery to the center; a housing in which the first guide member and the second guide member are built in, and a radial slot is formed in a portion facing the guide groove; and a moving member having one end supported by the slot and the other end supported by the guide groove and radially moving along the slot.
